title: auricula hortensis
intro: Auricula hortensis, also known as sweet alpine primrose or primrose of the rock, is a species of flowering plant in the family Primulaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can aid in wound healing and reduce pain. The health benefits of auricula hortensis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, relieve anxiety and stress, and support respiratory health. Herbal preparations of auricula hortensis can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
